content: ID: Jangan terlena dalam mimpi indah itu; di dasar bayang-bayang itu, dipenuhi oleh arwah  kasatmata yang menanti dalam senyap

real quick, this applies to every language here but I only noticed here because I have a very vague understanding of German (but not enough to actually read or speak it lol)

> Geh nicht gelassen in die gute Nacht.
I recognize the word **Nacht** here as **Night**, but please correct me if I'm wrong.
There was a bit of discussion right at the start [here](https://discord.com/channels/1402537664619479100/1416615133479960647/1449978958455115987) where it was confirmed intentional for this line to be a *reference* to the Dylan Thomas poem, but specifically replacing the word "Night" with "Dream".

Is **Geh nicht gelassen in die gute Nacht** your intended final contribution or would you like to amend it?
